transforms: Registered the uniRank country ranking page as an approved source for factual ranking snapshots only.

reviewNotes: Imported 40 matched uniRank 2026 Syrian University Ranking rows. The skipped row should remain a candidate-only review item unless OpenSyria later approves a broader scope or identity match.
